modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live chat session and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be poor spelling and grammar and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Confusion about signing up for AWOL Alternative Breaks

full_description_text: So, someone was asking where to find info on AWOL breaks. They wanna know how to sign up for these events. Also, they’re curious about becoming a member of the AWOL group. It seems like they’re not sure where to look for all this stuff.
short_description: Confusion about signing up for AWOL Alternative Breaks
description: So, someone was asking where to find info on AWOL breaks. They wanna know how to sign up for these events. Also, they’re curious about becoming a member of the AWOL group. It seems like they’re not sure where to look for all this stuff.
